title: SaaS remote desktop invite arrives in chat
description:
Remote desktop invites from BASE support to a SaaS customer (for example redpipe.pipeshare.net) now post into the live chat thread and use the chat session tenant, so the customer always receives an in-chat accept prompt. The Remote desktop control is shown in the chat header on both admin and customer while chat is live.

Who is affected: PipeShare support chat between pipeshare.live admins and SaaS tenant customers.
changeLog: Remote desktop invite is written into the active chat as a remote-invite message.
Remote session tenant is taken from the live chat (BASE admin → SaaS customer).
Customer chat shows an accept/decline prompt for remote desktop.
Remote desktop button appears on both sides of a live support chat.
Cache-bust portal support modules so SaaS clients load the fix.
